notes:
## Foxora Memory Den v1.0.0

- First publicly notarized release.
- Single-repo build: daemon (foxden + foxden-mcp) vendored at ./foxmemd/, no external workspace dependency.
- Apple Silicon (arm64) DMG signed + notarized + stapled.
- Auto-update channel wired (minisign pubkey AFF5029D5C004F1B).
- Daemon Windows-build ready (#[cfg(unix)] gate on UDS listener).
